overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a sleek, dark corporate lobby from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the Arasaka corporation's reception area with red carpet, modern furniture, and moody artificial lighting. The camera moves steadily through the empty, high-end office space.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate reception entrance with illuminated branding

events.description: passing the reception desk and turning slightly right to face the main lobby corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the Arasaka logo wall toward the reception desk in the empty corporate lobby

entered.detail: illuminated corporate signage on dark wall with white lettering
dark modern reception counter with computer monitor
glossy red floor surface reflecting overhead lights
white contemporary sofa in the background seating area
minimalist side table near the logo wall
small manicured tree in planter near the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit corporate reception area dominated by a large illuminated Arasaka logo on the left wall. The camera moves forward along a red polished floor toward a reception desk, passing a small round table and potted plant. The space is empty of people, with modern white sofas visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lobby corridor with seating areas

agents.ego_description: continuing down the red carpet through the open lobby toward the far end of the corridor

entered.detail: white upholstered bench along the left wall
arrangement of dark modern sofas and coffee tables
large indoor tree in planter on raised platform
textured decorative panel mounted on the left wall
recessed rectangular light fixtures in the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Having passed the reception desk, the camera proceeds down a wide corridor with red polished flooring. White benches line the left wall while a seating area with dark furniture and potted trees occupies the right. The space remains empty and quiet, with overhead lights illuminating the path toward a distant doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit corporate reception area that extends into a wide, sterile corridor. It begins by gliding along a polished red floor past a large illuminated Arasaka logo and a small potted plant, moving steadily toward a central reception desk. As the camera passes the desk, the space opens up into a long hallway where the red flooring continues to reflect the overhead lighting. The scene then shifts to reveal a symmetrical arrangement of white benches on the left and dark furniture with potted trees on the right, maintaining a quiet and empty atmosphere. The movement finally carries the viewer deeper into the corporate interior, heading toward a distant doorway at the end of the corridor.
